title: Need help setting up monday for a landscape company
excerpt:
Hi, We are landscape business and need help setting up monday to use to onboard and track a clients journey through the business. 
Ay suggestions of who can help??

posts.author: mattcustomcreations (MATTHEW DIAMOND SCOTT DIAMOND)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, We are landscape business and need help setting up monday to use to onboard and track a clients journey through the business.
Ay suggestions of who can help??

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mattcustomcreations - We would love you help you out with your monday journey! We are a certified monday.com partner and have worked with clients worldwide on new builds and optimizing their current designs.

We always start with a 30-60 minute complementary session to get a better understanding of your requirements and overall scope.

Feel free to reach out to me here via DM or info@greenllamas.com. Also check us out online to learn more about what we do!

Thanks!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mattcustomcreations

Welcome to the community! My team and I have done this sets ups for many of our clients.

I personally have specialised in Monday.com for over four years now and love the software! My team has a background in management and projects, allowing us to streamline our clients’ processes with ease! On my team, I have 3 Monday specialists, a project manager and a developer/Zapier expert, so you will never have to wait for answers.

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to review your current set up and show you options going forward. You can book a session through this link.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Elena
Founder of Kick Consulting

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @mattcustomcreations - Welcome to the community! Polished Geek is a product-certified team of consultants that specializes in helping you create business processes and workflows in monday․com that are perfectly tailored to the way your team works. Creating customer journey processes from initial lead intake through nurturing past clients to drive referrals and repeat business revenue is something we’ve built for many industries.

I’d love to chat with you to learn more about your business and see how we can help your landscape business do more with monday․com. You can book an initial consultation here: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com

~ Deb Cinkus
monday․com Certified Consultant

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mattcustomcreations,

Welcome to the monday community!

Developers from the right monday.com consulting company can help set up monday dot com and help your teams easily track and maintain client relationships.

monday com can act as a powerful client management software for your business. Unlike traditional CRM software, you can track all your clients or prospect communications, enhance customer engagement, and raise customer loyalty with monday implementation. monday com’s integration and automation capabilities help you save time and limit repetitive work so that your workforce can focus more on improving the customer journey.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
